description: Editorial Whimsy only. JAVELIN retains all live location, weather, air-quality, holiday/date, time-of-day, idle, and welcome-back logic.

messages.message: The unexamined life is not worth living.
messages.author: Socrates

messages.message: We are what we repeatedly do.
messages.author: Will Durant, summarizing Aristotle

messages.message: No person is free who is not master of themselves.
messages.author: Epictetus

messages.message: The happiness of your life depends upon the quality of your thoughts.
messages.author: Marcus Aurelius

messages.message: It is not things themselves that trouble us, but our judgments about them.
messages.author: Epictetus

messages.message: Wonder is the beginning of wisdom.
messages.author: Socrates

messages.message: The future depends on what you do today.
messages.author: Mahatma Gandhi

messages.message: A little progress each day adds up to something substantial.
A clear next step is often more useful than a perfect long-term plan.
You do not need to solve the whole day at once.
The shortest known war lasted less than an hour.
Octopuses have three hearts.
A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance.
Bananas are berries, while strawberries are not botanical berries.
Honey can remain edible for an extraordinarily long time when sealed and kept dry.
The Moon moves a few centimetres farther from Earth each year.
Some days are for momentum. Others are for quietly getting organized.
A tidy inbox is not a personality, but it can feel like one.
There is a special kind of optimism in opening one more browser tab.
Coffee is not a workflow, though it often attends the meetings.
The best systems make the right thing easier to do.
Good questions tend to improve both the work and the conversation.
Small acts of clarity are surprisingly powerful.
A calm pace can still be a productive pace.
